testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Authenticated user flow displays the sidebar with core menu items
testcase.classname: displays the sidebar with core menu items

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Authenticated user flow toggles the sidebar on mobile
OpenSparrow – Authenticated user flow displays user avatar button in header
testcase.classname: displays user avatar button in header

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Authenticated user flow displays notifications widget
OpenSparrow – Authenticated user flow shows admin link for admin users
testcase.classname: shows admin link for admin users

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Authenticated user flow navigates to Company grid
OpenSparrow – Authenticated user flow shows grid action buttons when present
testcase.classname: shows grid action buttons when present

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Authenticated user flow displays search and filter controls on grid
testcase.classname: displays search and filter controls on grid

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Authenticated user flow shows pagination if table has enough records
testcase.classname: shows pagination if table has enough records

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Authenticated user flow allows Add record when editor role
testcase.classname: allows Add record when editor role

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Login & Logout flow displays login page with branding
OpenSparrow – Login & Logout flow logs in successfully with valid credentials
testcase.classname: logs in successfully with valid credentials

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Login & Logout flow fails to log in with invalid password
testcase.classname: fails to log in with invalid password

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Login & Logout flow shows error when submitting with empty username
testcase.classname: shows error when submitting with empty username

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Login & Logout flow logs out successfully
OpenSparrow – Mobile viewport loads dashboard on mobile
OpenSparrow – Mobile viewport displays mobile-friendly grid on mobile
OpenSparrow – Mobile viewport shows mobileActions select on mobile viewport
testcase.classname: shows mobileActions select on mobile viewport

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Mobile viewport mobileActions select has at least export option
testcase.classname: mobileActions select has at least export option
